notes.sg-evolutionary-biology: While evolutionary biology uses molecular biology techniques, it is a distinct field. The sample titles suggest a focus on comparative genomics and evolution, not core molecular biology.
notes.sg-programming-language: This label is too generic. The member terms and sample titles point to bioinformatics and computational biology tools, not programming languages themselves.
notes.sg-internal-medicine: Internal medicine is a clinical field and not a subtopic of molecular biology.
